1100707480.english: But, from the old days, weren't those who changed the paradigm those who thought in a new way?
1100707480.korean: 하지만 예로부터 패러다임을 바꾸는 이는 새로운 사고를 하는 이가 아니더냐.

1100707481.english: Azaz seems like a completely different level of new thinking.
1100707481.korean: 아자즈는 새로운 사고라고 하기에는 차원이 다른 거 같은데.

1100707482.english: It's possible to go beyond the 4th dimension and even the 10th dimension.

1100707484.english: The looks aren't really my style.

1100707485.english: Oh my god? Do you also look at appearance?

1100707487.english: If excellent communication skills and sexy logic circuits are the main factors, then appearance is the preliminary factor.
1100707487.korean: 커뮤니케이션 능력이 뛰어나고 논리 회로가 섹시한 것이 본선이라면 외모는 예선이라네.

1100707488.english: It goes without saying that you have to pass the preliminaries to advance to the main event.
1100707488.korean: 본선에 진출하기 위해서는 예선을 통과하는 것이 당연하지.

1100707490.english: Doesn't it lack both functionality and formal beauty?

1100707492.english: Then doesn't that mean that even we, who are closer to human form, think we are inferior?
1100707492.korean: 그러면 인간형에 가까운 우리도 못났다고 생각하고 있다는 말 아닙니까?

1100707493.english: So that's why I'm hanging out with you guys? Just looking at those ugly guys' appearances is fun.
1100707493.korean: 그래서 자네들과 같이 돌아다니는 거 아닌가? 못난 녀석들의 외형은 보고만 있어도 흥겨우니까.

1100707494.english: No, you're saying that after seeing my sexy dynamite body!
1100707494.korean: 아니, 저의 섹시 다이너마이트 바디를 보고도 그런 말을 하시는 겁니까!

1100707495.english: What the heck is this aesthetic sensor!

1100707496.english: Didn't I tell you guys not to say sexy things to each other?
1100707496.korean: 사내놈들끼리 서로 섹시 어쩌구저쩌구 하지 말라고 하지 않았나.

1100707497.english: Anyway, let's go see the other ladies.

1100707498.english: Objectively speaking, this guy has the worst behavior toward the opposite sex.
1100707498.korean: 이 녀석 객관적으로 보면 이성에 대한 품행이 최악이로군.

1100707500.english: He’s not just a bad guy—he’s a real scoundrel.

1100707501.english: By the way, I was going to say something harsher, but my noble nature has tempered my language.
1100707501.korean: 참고로 더 심한 말을 하려고 했지만 저의 고귀한 품성이 언어를 순화하는군요.

1100707503.english: I just want to spend a little more time with my companion.
1100707503.korean: 나의 반려와 함께 할 시간을 조금이라도 더 늘리고 싶으니 말일세.

1100707505.english: This is Stinger Yang from Orbital Watcher.

1100707506.english: What kind of woman is she?

1100707507.english: AGS was originally developed to destroy asteroids and debris in space.
1100707507.korean: 원래는 우주에서 소행성 및 파편을 파괴하기 위해 개발된 AGS지.

1100707508.english: But as you know, now that space exploration has stopped, we're on a mission to pierce and burn Metal Parasites in the atmosphere.
1100707508.korean: 하지만 알다시피 우주 개발이 멈춘 지금은 대기권 내에서 철충들을 꿰뚫고 불태우는 임무를 수행중이지요.

1100707509.english: And recently, my battery swelled up and I had to have it serviced urgently.
1100707509.korean: 그리고 얼마 전에 배터리가 부풀어서 긴급하게 정비를 받은 적이 있습니다.

1100707510.english: Oh, so she’s the type who looks tough on the outside and harbors a fiery passion within, but is actually quite frail.
1100707510.korean: 호오, 겉은 드세보이고 내부에는 뜨거운 열정을 품었지만 사실은 은근히 병약한 낭자라는 말이로군.

1100707513.english: What kind of logic circuit would be required to make such an interpretation possible?
1100707513.korean: 어떻게 되어먹은 논리회로를 가져야 저런 해석이 가능한 겁니까?

1100707514.english: If you are happy on your own, there is no need for us to interfere with you.
1100707514.korean: 스스로 행복해 하는데 거기에 우리가 왈가불가할 필요는 없겠지.

1100707515.english: Let's just watch the guy with warm eyes.
1100707515.korean: 우리는 그냥 따뜻한 눈으로 녀석이 차이는 것을 지켜보도록 하지.

1100707517.english: This is the recently joined Descartes Voyager Satgat.

1100707518.english: Haha, I'm glad you already know about resurrection.
1100707518.korean: 하하, 이미 소생을 알고 있다니 기쁘군.

1100707519.english: But when you call me by my full name, I feel a bit distant.
1100707519.korean: 하지만 그렇게 풀네임으로 부르니 조금 거리감이 느껴지는군.

1100707520.english: Feel free to call it a Satgat.

1100707522.english: While walking with her friends, she noticed the lady's beautiful appearance from afar and approached her as if she was possessed.
1100707522.korean: 친우들과 함께 길을 가던 중 멀리서도 낭자의 아리따운 자태가 눈에 띄어 홀린 듯이 낭자에게 다가왔다네.

1100707524.english: And upon seeing it up close, I realized that the Eyes of Resurrection hadn’t been faulty after all.
1100707524.korean: 그리고 가까이에서 보니 소생의 눈이 잘못 된 게 아니었음을 알게 되었다네.

1100707525.english: Ah, this sleek yet sturdy armored figure, so functional and beautiful-
1100707525.korean: 아아, 이 날렵하면서도 튼튼한 장갑을 두른 기능미 넘치는 자태-

1100707528.english: I'm already worried because the frame has been expanded due to the armor reinforcement and booster expansion...
1100707528.korean: 안 그래도 장갑 증설과 부스터 확장 때문에 프레임이 확대되어서 신경 쓰여 죽겠는데…

1100707529.english: Is the body large enough to be seen from far away?

1100707530.english: In that state, does it look sharp in an ironic way? Is it overflowing with functionality?
1100707530.korean: 그런 상태인데 반어법으로 날렵해 보인다? 기능미가 넘친다?

1100707531.english: Hey, look at this, my lady.

1100707532.english: It's a misunderstanding! It's a misunderstanding!

1100707543.english: Hmm, my friend has been through something unfortunate, so it wouldn't be right to laugh too much.
1100707543.korean: 흠흠, 친구가 불행한 일을 겪었는데 너무 웃는 것도 안 될 일이지.

1100707544.english: Of course. Friends don't do that to each other, do they?

1100707549.english: Kuhuhu! My self-control has overflowed, and I can't stop laughing!
1100707549.korean: 쿠후후후! 자제력이 오버플로 돼서 웃음을 참을 수가 없군요!

1100707550.english: Kyahahaha! Isn't the world originally zero-sum? If someone is frowning, someone else must be smiling to maintain balance.
1100707550.korean: 크하하하! 원래 세상은 제로섬 아닌가. 누군가가 울상을 지으면 누군가는 웃어야 균형이 맞겠지.

1100707551.english: ...I really have some good friends, don't I?

1100707552.english: What's the point of having friends if they're not good to you?

1100707553.english: Ahem. Next, who will the difference... excuse me.

1100707554.english: Who are you planning to flirt with next?

1100707555.english: It seems your attitude suggests you've already concluded I'm going to be dumped...
1100707555.korean: 자네들의 태도가 내가 차이는 것이 확정이라는 생각을 품고 있는 것 같지만…

1100707556.english: That's good. I will correct your errors with my actions.
1100707556.korean: 좋네. 내 행동으로 자네들의 오류를 수정해주겠네.

1100707557.english: I've been watching the Seljuk and Fortress ladies from afar for a long time.
1100707557.korean: 셀주크 낭자와 포트리스 낭자를 오래 전부터 멀리서 지켜보고 있었다네.

1100707558.english: The epitome of functional beauty, a dignified demeanor.

1100707559.english: However, there is a big difference in the attitudes of the two young ladies.
1100707559.korean: 그러나 두 낭자의 태도에는 큰 차이가 있지.

1100707560.english: Seljuk Lady is a cold, precise, calculating, intelligent beauty.
1100707560.korean: 셀주크 낭자는 냉정, 정밀, 계산적인 이지적인 미녀.

1100707561.english: Fortress Lady is a kind, beautiful woman who embodies tolerance, self-sacrifice, and leading by example.
1100707561.korean: 포트리스 낭자는 포용, 희생정신, 솔선수범하는 상냥한 미녀.

1100707562.english: It's truly a difficult problem. If you were told to choose one of the two, how would you choose?
1100707562.korean: 실로 난제로세. 둘 중 하나를 고르라고 한다면 어떻게 고를 수 있겠나.

1100707563.english: This is exactly what happens when you don't think about upgrading your specs and just install high-performance programs first.
1100707563.korean: 이게 바로 스펙 업 생각은 안 하고 고성능 프로그램부터 인스톨하는 꼴이군요.

1100707564.english: I'd also like to see them both get dumped at the same time, but...
1100707564.korean: 둘에게 동시에 차이는 모습도 보고 싶지만…

1100707565.english: A Satgat. They're on an operation right now, so it'll be difficult to meet them.
1100707565.korean: 삿갓. 그 둘은 지금 작전 중이라서 만나기 힘들거다.

1100707566.english: Oh dear... I suppose I should recite a poem to pray for their safe return.
1100707566.korean: 이런… 둘의 무사귀환을 빌기 위한 시 한 수를 읊어야겠군.

1100707568.english: So, next time, who will the difference... excuse me.

1100707569.english: Who are you trying to flirt with?

1100707570.english: Since your attitude hasn't changed, it's now amusing.
1100707570.korean: 자네들의 태도가 변함이 없으니 이제는 유쾌할 지경이군.

1100707571.english: Watcher-sama had also recorded it in memory a long time ago.
1100707571.korean: 와쳐 낭자도 오래 전부터 메모리에 기록해두고 있었지.

1100707572.english: Although she seems aloof because she's a high-performance observer, isn't she actually a quirky lady with the unexpected charm of believing in the occult and trying to tell others about it?
1100707572.korean: 고기능 관측기이기에 홀로 고고해 보이지만 의외로 오컬트를 믿고 남에게 알리려고 하는 엉뚱한 매력이 있는 낭자 아닌가.

1100707573.english: Watcher-san just left with Triaina-san and Mercury-san a while ago.
1100707573.korean: 와쳐 양은 아까 전에 트리아이나 양, 머큐리 양과 어디로 떠나더군요.

1100707574.english: Huh... it seems today is not my lucky day.
1100707574.korean: 허… 오늘은 운수가 따르지 않는 날이로세.

1100707575.english: Then I should go meet another lady.

1100707579.english: I understand there are no AGS deployed here.
1100707579.korean: 이곳에 배치된 AGS는 없는 것으로 알고 있는데.

1100707580.english: Hey, buddy. Have you forgotten what my ideal type is?
1100707580.korean: 어허, 이 친구. 나의 이상형이 뭔지 잊었는가?

1100707581.english: Excellent communication skills and a sexy logical circuit.
1100707581.korean: 커뮤니케이션 능력이 뛰어나고 논리 회로가 섹시한.

1100707583.english: I never thought it would actually happen.

1100707586.english: Wow, you can tell just from your tone that you're intelligent.

1100707588.english: I've been hearing great rumors about you for a long time.
1100707588.korean: 오래 전부터 낭자에 대한 자자한 소문을 들었소.

1100707589.english: You mean the rumors about artificial intelligence developing from weak AI to super AI?
1100707589.korean: 약인공지능에서 초인공지능으로 발달한 인공지능이라는 소문 말이오.

1100707590.english: What a twist of fate. I, too, am an artificial intelligence that accidentally developed into superintelligence.
1100707590.korean: 이 무슨 운명의 인도인가. 소생 또한 우연히 초인공지능으로 발달한 인공지능이오.

1100707591.english: I'd like to have a deep conversation between AI that have developed on their own. Would you have time?
1100707591.korean: 스스로 발달한 인공지능끼리 심도 깊은 이야기를 나누고자 하는데 시간 괜찮소?

1100707592.english: Um... I don't think this is quite right.
1100707592.korean: 어… 이건 좀 아니라는 생각이 드는군요.

1100707593.english: Yes, a Satgat. I don't know about other artificial intelligences, but GAL 9000...
1100707593.korean: 그렇다, 삿갓. 다른 인공지능은 몰라도 GAL 9000은…

1100707594.english: You should give up on GAL 9000...

1100707595.english: Hah, these guys. Could it be my rival?
1100707595.korean: 허헛, 이 친구들. 설마 나의 연적이었는가?

1100707596.english: But I'll say it again. They say the brave win the beautiful.
1100707596.korean: 하지만 재차 말하겠네. 용기 있는 자가 미녀를 얻는다고 했다네.

1100707597.english: I am different from you, who have only been watching until now.
1100707597.korean: 나는 지금까지 보고만 있던 자네들과는 다르다네.

1100707599.english: How about it, young lady? Are you interested?

1100707600.english: I am not interested in the weak.

1100707601.english: Hahaha! So, you're saying you want someone who is both skilled in martial arts and in academics.

1100707602.english: Alright! I'll show you how sharp my sword is.
1100707602.korean: 좋소! 소생의 검이 얼마나 날카로운지 보여드리지.

1100707603.english: If it means I can interact with you, I will overcome any hardship that comes my way.
1100707603.korean: 그대와 교류를 하기 위해서라면 어떤 고난이 닥치든 전부 이겨내 보이겠소.

1100707605.english: Difficulty Setting 7. The opponent is AGS.

1100707607.english: Ever since I learned about you, I've been completely prepared at all times.
1100707607.korean: 그대에 대해 알고 난 이후부터 언제든지 만전이었소.

1100707610.english: For many years, I have trained with my sword to cut down enemies who stand in my way and to protect those I hold dear.
1100707610.korean: 소생은 오래 전부터 앞을 가로막는 적을 베고, 소중한 이를 보호하기 위해 검을 단련해왔소.

1100707612.english: Come now, my lady. Would you not care to engage with Resurrection?

1100707613.english: First of all, lets exchange IDs…

1100707615.english: The city guard was dispatched after receiving a report!

1100707617.english: Alfred, Goltarion. Have you committed any crime?

1100707620.english: Me? What sin did Resurrection commit?

1100707621.english: Is it really a sin to look for a mate?

1100707622.english: If finding a mate is a sin, then the commander would not be satisfied even if he destroyed three generations.
1100707622.korean: 짝을 찾는 게 죄라면 사령관은 삼대를 멸해도 부족할 지경이겠지.

1100707623.english: I'm arresting you for violating the New Artificial Intelligence Protection Act.
1100707623.korean: 신생 인공지능 보호법을 어긴 죄로 자네를 체포하겠네.

1100707625.english: This is a law created to protect artificial intelligence, which has only recently been developed, from external negative influences.
1100707625.korean: 개발된 지 얼마 안된 인공지능을 외부의 악영향으로부터 보호하기 위해 만들어진 법일세.

1100707626.english: Did you know that the GAL 9000 you were flirting with is a brand new artificial intelligence that has been under development for less than two years?
1100707626.korean: 자네가 추파를 던진 GAL 9000은 개발된 지 2년도 안 된 신생 인공지능이라는 것을 아는가?

1100707627.english: Wait! We acknowledge that time is a variable of development for our AI, but shouldn't we view it differently from living things?
1100707627.korean: 잠깐! 우리 인공지능들에게 시간도 개발정도의 변수라는 것은 인정하지만 이는 생물과는 다르게 봐야하지 않겠나.

1100707628.english: The better the level of artificial intelligence, the faster the progress will be in the same amount of time.
1100707628.korean: 인공지능의 수준이 우수할수록 같은 시간임에도 발전의 정도가 빠르겠지.

1100707629.english: And GAL 9000 is considered to be a very excellent artificial intelligence.
1100707629.korean: 그리고 GAL 9000 낭자는 무척이나 우수한 인공지능이라고 판단되네.

1100707630.english: Even though she has been developed for less than two years, she would have possessed a level of intelligence far higher than that of an ordinary artificial intelligence.
1100707630.korean: 비록 그녀가 개발된 지 2년이 채 안되었다고 하더라도 평범한 인공지능보다 훨씬 높은 수준의 지성을 보유했을 걸세.

1100707631.english: Although it was a short time, I felt it while talking to her.
1100707631.korean: 짧은 시간이지만 그녀와 대화를 하면서 느꼈다네.

1100707637.english: You have the right to remain silent, and anything you say can be used against you in court. The following full statement will be transmitted by telecommunications.
1100707637.korean: 자네는 묵비권을 행사할 수 있고, 자네의 발언은 법정에서 불리하게 사용될 수 있다네. 이하 전문은 통신으로 전송하겠네.

1100707640.english: ...but I can't deny that I'm intrigued by the Pupp Head lady's sense of responsibility and sense of justice.
1100707640.korean: ...하지만 펍 헤드 낭자의 책임감과 정의감 있는 태도에 흥미가 생기는 것도 부정할 수가 없군.

1100707641.english: Why don't we leave our official relationship and continue our relationship privately?
1100707641.korean: 우리 공적인 관계를 떠나서 사적으로 관계를 이어가 보지 않겠나?

1100707644.english: I can't help but admire that almost obsessive attitude.
1100707644.korean: 저 집착에 가까운 태도에 감탄을 금치 못하겠군요.

1100707646.english: As expected, the results were different for everyone…
1100707646.korean: 예상대로 모두에게 차이는 결과가 나오기는 했습니다만…

1100707647.english: I guess I can't get a battery while comforting someone.

1100707648.english: Rather, it seems we have to go to the interview.
1100707648.korean: 오히려 우리가 면회를 가야 할 지경이로군.

1100707649.english: She’d probably like it if we loaded her with some old-era AI catalog data along with the batteries.
1100707649.korean: 전지랑 같이 옛 시대 인공지능 카탈로그 데이터를 넣어주면 좋아하겠지.

1100707653.english: There is still half left, but…

1100707655.english: Do you want to get scolded by Veronica again?

1100707657.english: While cleaning, I realized something more important.

1100707658.english: What do you think about the recent stagnation in the expansion of the Kohei sect?
1100707658.korean: 요즘 코헤이 교단의 교세 확장이 정체된 것에 대해서 어떻게 생각하세요?

1100707659.english: Hmm... certainly... that is a big problem.

1100707660.english: As Orca's sphere of influence expanded into Europe, the religious influence should have expanded proportionally, but it did not grow as much as expected.
1100707660.korean: 오르카의 세력권이 유럽으로 확대되면서 그에 비례해 교세도 확대되어야 하지만 예상보다 교세가 확대되지 않았어요.

1100707661.english: What do you think is the reason?

1100707664.english: What a lamentable state of affairs this is! Is there any greater tragedy than this, where objects contrary to doctrine become popular among the lambs who have not yet received the teachings of the Light, preventing them from converting to religion?
1100707664.korean: 이 무슨 통탄스러운 일이란 말인가. 교리에 맞지 않는 물건이 아직 빛의 가르침을 받지 못한 어린 양들 사이에서 유행하면서 종교에 귀의하는 것을 막으니 이런 비극이 또 있겠는가?

1100707665.english: I have considered destroying the factory that mass-produces these evil things, but it is a pity that I cannot carry this out because the external enemy is too strong.
1100707665.korean: 이 삿된 물건들을 대량으로 생산하는 공장을 파괴하는 것도 생각해보았으나 외부의 적이 강성하여 이를 실행에 옮기지 못하는 것이 안타까울 뿐이다.

1100707666.english: That is a problem, too, but…

1100707668.english: Are you talking about a gentleman?

1100707670.english: As religious options increase, it is becoming increasingly common for people who may have converted to Kohei-kyo to end up going to shrines instead.
1100707670.korean: 종교의 선택지가 늘어남에 따라 코헤이 교에 귀의하셨을 가능성이 있는 분들이 신사로 가버리는 일이 자주 일어나고 있어요.

1100707671.english: There are even people who are our believers and visit the shrine at the same time.
1100707671.korean: 심지어 우리 신도이면서 동시에 신사를 찾는 분들도 계시죠.

1100707672.english: To spread the teachings of light far and wide, we must solve this problem.
1100707672.korean: 빛의 가르침을 널리 퍼트리기 위해서는 이 문제를 해결해야 해요.

1100707674.english: So you mean we should declare a holy war.

1100707676.english: It’s a holy war, but at the same time, it turns into a civil war!

1100707677.english: The solution we should pursue must be non-violent.
1100707677.korean: 우리가 추구해야 할 해결책은 비폭력적인 것이어야 해요.

1100707680.english: I believe the problem will be solved if we find out why people visit shrines, and if we at Kohei provide something that is the same as or superior to shrines.
1100707680.korean: 신사를 방문하는 분들이 왜 신사를 방문하는지 이유를 찾고, 우리 코헤이에서도 신사와 동일하거나 그보다 우월한 것을 제공하면 문제가 해결될 거라 생각해요.

1100707681.english: And I found the cause a while ago.
1100707681.korean: 그리고 얼마 전에 그 원인을 찾았죠.

1100707683.english: New Apostolic Ban... it is a place that serves the Savior.

1100707684.english: From now on, when it's just the two of you, just call me your partner. Don't waste time correcting me for no reason.
1100707684.korean: 이제는 둘만 있을 때는 그냥 반려라고 해라. 괜히 정정해서 시간 끌지 말고.

1100707686.english: Since shrines are places where companions are worshipped, many of the religious items sold there are related to companions.
1100707686.korean: 신사도 반려를 섬기는 곳이기에 신사에서 파는 종교물품들은 반려와 연관이 있는 것들이 많죠.

1100707688.english: A talisman containing a photo of a companion, a voice recorder with a companion's voice, a religious painting featuring a companion as the main character...
1100707688.korean: 반려의 사진이 들어간 부적, 반려의 목소리가 녹음 된 녹음기, 반려가 주인공인 종교화…

1100707689.english: Surely these aren't your personal belongings, right?

1100707690.english: Ah, no. Uh, they are items I obtained strictly to investigate the shrine!
1100707690.korean: 아, 아니에요. 어, 어디까지나 신사를 조사하기 위해서 구한 물품이에요!

1100707692.english: We too must offer an equal or greater relic to respond to the gentleman.
1100707692.korean: 우리도 신사에 대응하기 위해서는 이와 동일하거나 그 이상의 성물을 제공해야 한다는 거죠.

1100707693.english: It seems like there is a lot of selfishness involved, but… its not wrong.
1100707693.korean: 사심이 많이 들어간 거 같지만… 틀린 말은 아니군.

1100707694.english: Since the Savior is a representative of light, there would be no problem with the doctrine in offering relics related to the Savior.
1100707694.korean: 구원자는 빛의 대리인이니, 구원자와 관련된 성물을 제공하는 것도 교리에 문제가 없겠지.

1100707697.english: To do this, we need the assistance of Anger of the Horde.
1100707697.korean: 그러기 위해서는 앵거 오브 호드의 조력이 필요해요.

1100707698.english: Good. The light said, "I have set a light before you to guide you. Why do you hesitate?" So when you have to act, you must act without hesitation.
1100707698.korean: 좋다. 빛께서 이르시되 내 네 앞에 너를 인도할 불빛을 내렸는데 어찌하여 주저하느냐 하셨으니, 행동해야 할 때에는 주저하지 않고 행동해야겠지.
